skills.name: addon-author
skills.description: Scaffold a new Python addon that plugs into the fastapi_server bootstrap pipeline — correct signature, failure isolation, and LoaderReport shape.

skills.name: contract-parity
skills.description: Safely change a JSON Schema under contracts/ and mirror it to fastify_server so parity tests stay green.

skills.name: lifecycle-hook
skills.description: Write `on_init` / `on_startup` / `on_shutdown` modules that the lifecycle_addon will pick up and run at the right phase.

skills.name: loader-report
skills.description: Build, mutate, and assert on LoaderReport instances. The canonical result shape every addon must return.

skills.name: pyproject-publish
skills.description: Update pyproject.toml and staging files for a PyPI release of thinkeloquent-fastapi-server. Do NOT run publish commands — scaffold a Makefile.publish for the user instead.

skills.name: route-module
skills.description: Write a *_routes.py module that the built-in route_addon will discover and mount on the FastAPI app.
